steps.t: Saeradan is at his camp, Echad Saeradan, in the Windfells, in Enedwaith. His camp can be found on a hilltop in the Windfells, south-west of Echad Dago…
The road north of Echad Saeradan may have been blockaded by forces of Saruman. Saeradan has asked you to investigate the road north for signs of block…
Saeradan is at his camp south of the blockaded road in Fordirith. You found a report and a sword with ancient markings in the coffer at the blockaded …
